sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE DICTIONARY my_dict (id Int32, name String) PRIMARY KEY id SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(HOST 'localhost' PORT 9000 USER 'default' PASSWORD '' DATABASE 'default')) LIFETIME(30) LAYOUT(flat);
SELECT dictHas('my_dict', id) FROM example_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE example_table SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE dictHas('my_dict', id) = 1;
